case_title: PETER FINN CHOW VS. GORDON REED MORAN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,644.72 FILED BY CHOW, PETER FINN AS TO DEFENDANT MORAN, GORDON REED ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-22-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-22-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-31-2018 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF PETER FINN CHOW IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT GORDON REED MORAN IS PRESENT. PARTIES HAVE REACHED A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. PER PLAINTIFF REQUEST, PROGRESS REPORTS WILL BE CALENDARED BI-MONTHLY UNTIL SETTLEMENT TERMS ARE FULLY EXECUTED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
